title: FAMILY VIOLENCE SERVICES - 211info
text: CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF THE UMATILLA INDIAN RESERVATION FAMILY VIOLENCE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps survivors of domestic/intimate partner violence, sexual assault, rape, stalking, teen dating violence, and elder abuse with safety planning and guidance through the justice systems (Tribal, state, and federal). 46411 Timine Way Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Survivors of domestic or intimate partner violence, sexual assault, rape, stalking, teen dating violence, and elder abuse Hours: Hotline: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Office: Monday-Friday 7:30am-4pm Email (541) 240-4171 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Hotline (541) 240-4171 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Umatilla County within a 50-mile radius of the Umatilla Indian Reservation SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7:30am-4pm Services: Domestic Violence Hotlines * Native American Community Elder/Dependent Adult Abuse Reporting * Native American Community Sexual Assault Hotlines * Native American Community Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - HEAD START INFORMATION SERVICES - TRIBAL MEMBER SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF THE UMATILLA INDIAN RESERVATION
